# Gimeracil 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Gimeracil 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Gimeracil</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Gimeracil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Teysuno is indicated in adults: - for the treatment of advanced gastric cancer when given in combination with cisplatin (see section 5.1). - as monotherapy or in combination with oxaliplatin or...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>gastric carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>colonic neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>malignant gastric granular cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（99.8%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（99.8%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>cardia cancer（99.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/gimeracil/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
